body.title: Annotate all skill frontmatter with explicit model choice (Haiku default, Sonnet where design-reasoning required)
body.result: Added model: haiku to commit/note/savestate/savestateauto/ticket/validate-files/context-load/day-close; model: sonnet to sprint/test-fix
body.description:
Declare explicit `model:` in SKILL.md frontmatter for every skill under ~/.claude/skills/. Rule: pure checklist+shell+DB work → model: haiku; needs design judgment mid-flight → model: sonnet. Expected Haiku set: commit, context-load, note, ticket, validate-files, day-close (with exception annotation). Expected Sonnet: sprint, sprint-batch, decided, fixit, test-fix. Estimated 60-70% cost reduction on 7 mechanical skills invocations. Scope: model annotations only — no skill body changes. Files: all 10 undeclared skills' frontmatter.

test_plan: Invoke each changed skill with a test input, grep invocation log for model ID. Confirm Haiku fires on commit, note, ticket, validate-files; Sonnet fires on sprint, decided.
